series_metadata.series_description: Financial reports required by the federal governmentadministering ODJFS federal programs. In all supporting documentation the reportscontain statistical expenditure data by program compiled from information received fromcounty agencies and computer generated data. Files include backup documentation,worksheets and related correspondence. Agencies served are Department of Labor(DOL), Department of Health and Human Services (DHHS), United States Departmentof Agriculture (USDA), Food and Nutrition Services (FNS). Reconciliation documentationof claim to draw in all supporting documentation.
